zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Davenport於大約1281年出生在英國爾達文波特 帕克時，他的父親Sir Thomas Davenport29歲，母親Agnes de Macclesfield24歲。他於大約1301年與Margery Brereton在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1358年享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Davenport于大约1281年出生在英国爾達文波特 帕克时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Davenport29岁，母亲Agnes de Macclesfield24岁。他于大约1301年与Margery Brereton在英国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1358年享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Davenport was born about 1281, in Davenport Park, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Davenport, was 29 and his mother, Agnes de Macclesfield, was 24. He married Margery Brereton about 1301, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1358, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Davenport est né environ 1281, à Davenport Park, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Davenport, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Macclesfield, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margery Brereton environ 1301, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1358, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Davenport um 1281 in Davenport Park, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Davenport 29 und seine Mutter Agnes de Macclesfield 24. Er hat um 1301 in England Margery Brereton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1358 im Alter von 78 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Davenport è nato il circa 1281 nel Davenport Park, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Davenport, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Macclesfield, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margery Brereton circa 1301, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1358, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Davenportが約1281年にイギリスチェシュアイアダベンプオルト パークで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Davenportは29歳，母Agnes de Macclesfieldは24歳であった。約1301年にイギリスでMargery Breretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1358年に78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Davenport(이)가 대략 1281년 영국 체실르 대븐포트 박에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Davenport(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Macclesfield(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1301년 영국에서 Margery Brereton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1358년 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Davenport nasceu aproximadamente 1281, em Davenport Park, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Davenport, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Macclesfield, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Brereton aproximadamente 1301, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1358, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Davenport родился около 1281 г. в местности давенпорт парк, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Davenport было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Macclesfield, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Brereton около 1301 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1358 г. в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Davenport nació aproximadamente 1281, en Davenport Park, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Davenport, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes de Macclesfield, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margery Brereton aproximadamente 1301, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1358, a la edad de 78 años.
